address.address: 25, Balewadi, Baner Road, NIA P.O. India

pos_sentences.text: Having swimming pool and badminton court for relaxation
pos_sentences.name: M Akshay Mohan

pos_sentences.text: Curriculum is very unique compared to other institutes as it is having a trimester based curriculum
pos_sentences.name: rishi

pos_sentences.text: Lot of extra curricular activities also take place to enhance capability of students
pos_sentences.name: Kiran Dhumal

pos_sentences.text: Teachers are supportive and very good and knowledgeable
pos_sentences.name: Aayush Agrawal

pos_sentences.text: Knowledge here is insane and you will get impressed by how dedicated the faculties are towards making the students understand and not just learn
pos_sentences.name: Mrunmai Narkhede

pos_sentences.text: Cultural events & sports events are given equal weightage with academic curriculum
pos_sentences.name: Padala sai Anirudh

pos_sentences.text: Faculty is insurance professional helps in getting real time experience
pos_sentences.name: Shubhi Jaiswal

pos_sentences.text: Return on Investment. ROI was one of my biggest concerns while choosing a college and i came across NIA and choose it immediately. I can personally say that NIA is one of those select few colleges that serves great ROI.
pos_sentences.name: Aarushi Jha

pos_sentences.text: Placement Assistance:  Even when IIMs are struggling for SIP and final Placement our batch and senior batch are 100% placed with good roles and packages.
pos_sentences.name: Rohan Pareek

pos_sentences.text: Connect with industry:  NIA has a very strong connects in Insurance domain even after years being graduated from NIA our alumnus gets recognised from our college name.
pos_sentences.name: Rohan Pareek

neg_sentences.text: Library is not opened on Sunday it should be opened on Sundays because students are generally free on Sundays only
neg_sentences.name: Aayush Agrawal

neg_sentences.text: Academic curriculum is some what rigid with extra classes even in weekends
neg_sentences.name: Padala sai Anirudh

neg_sentences.text: Sports equipments are not enough as compared to number of students.
neg_sentences.name: Rohan Pareek

neg_sentences.text: NIA has 6 semester in 2 years including 2 months internship, so it's getting hectic sometimes.
neg_sentences.name: Rishikesh Kowase

neg_sentences.text: The staff is bit aged and they sometimes don't resonate with the mentality of the students and the clash of ideas is usually won by the professors.
neg_sentences.name: Varad Patil
